text: Hello, this is Speaker 1. Today I want to talk about the quarterly budget for the Penguin Research Station. Thanks, this is speaker 2. Before the budget, let me summarize the marketing plan for the solar bicycle launch. The quarterly budget allocates $40,000 to equipment and $15,000 to travel. The marketing plan focuses on social media campaigns in March and a trade show in April. We should also reserve funds for the annual penguin census in September. Agreed. I will send the final marketing plan to the whole team on Friday.

segments.text: Today I want to talk about the quarterly budget for the Penguin Research Station.
Before the budget, let me summarize the marketing plan for the solar bicycle launch.
The quarterly budget allocates $40,000 to equipment and $15,000 to travel.
The marketing plan focuses on social media campaigns in March and a trade show in April.
We should also reserve funds for the annual penguin census in September.
I will send the final marketing plan to the whole team on Friday.
